title: Execute-safe post-run recommended action reason refresh after autonomous loop proof v0
problem: Tickets 343/350 refresh scratch and improvement status fields after execute-safe autonomous loop proof, but next_recommended_action.reason is built pre-run and is not rebuilt with post-proof scratch/improvement summaries (ticket-341/354).
acceptance_criteria: After successful execute-safe autonomous loop proof, next_recommended_action.reason reflects post-run scratch and improvement summaries.
Failed execute-safe leaves pre-run reason unchanged.
rollback_plan: Revert execute-safe reason refresh hook only.
